author: assistant
scope: Admits PLAN-20260706-0003 only as a read-only diagnostic/advisory contract slice for L0 discovery suggestions. This warrant does not admit automatic context inclusion, provider prompt changes, live retrieval, production embeddings, persistent index/store mutation, token-budget telemetry/enforcement, non-none reranking, or adapter behavior.
reason: GAP-0001 remains open, but the repository now has explicit L0 inclusion, read-only candidate diagnostics, and a diagnostic-only hybrid simulator. A read-only advisor contract is the smallest governed step toward observable L0 discovery while preserving selection_effect none and requiring a separate PLAN/WARRANT for any future automatic inclusion.
